goal: prevent premium landing pages from passing without generated or real media evidence

description: XR medical prototype passed section-quality QA despite support-only asset manifest

asi.learned: existing landing gates checked visual richness and scroll behavior, not generated media provenance

description: add asset evidence linter, QA routing, and durable self-improve regression

asi.hypothesis: a manifest-based asset provenance gate will catch code-rendered premium pages
asi.learned: the XR medical prototype now fails asset evidence while the synthetic generated-media fixture passes
asi.next_action_hint: regenerate XR page with actual image/video assets and rerun asset_evidence_lint
